title: lisianthius aurantiacus
intro: Lisianthius aurantiacus, also known as the Red Lisianthus, is a flowering plant species in the Gentianaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lisianthius aurantiacus include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve respiratory symptoms, and boost the immune system. Lisianthius aurantiacus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, bronchitis, and other respiratory conditions.
